events.content: "Evidence": "npx markdownlint-cli2 executed on touched .md files; 0 errors reported"
"action": "Implemented .claude/skills/orphan-ref-validator/ with scripts/scan.py and tests/test_scan.py; 34 tests pass"
"action": "Wired orphan-ref-validator as fourth Mandatory Exit Gate in .claude/commands/build.md with VERDICT: CRITICAL_FAIL blocking semantics"
"action": "Refactored denylist into filters.py module per taste-lints file-size cap; renamed from _filters.py to satisfy snake_case naming rule. scan.py 485 lines under cap. 34 tests pass, scan PASS"

"action": "Pre-push surfaced two blockers: marketplace count divergence with canonical validator_marketplace_counts.py (my naive iterdir counted templates/CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md), and security-suppression comment. Aligned enumerate_count to canonical strategies per canonical-source-mirror.md (excluded AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md from agents; recursive walk for commands). Replaced try/except ImportError with __package__ check to remove type: ignore. Ran build/scripts/build_all.py to regenerate src/copilot-cli/skills/orphan-ref-validator/ and src/copilot-cli/skills/build/SKILL.md mirrors."

"action": "PR review feedback round 1: 19 inline comments. Critical fixes - (1) Success envelope contract per ADR-056: Success now reflects scan execution not finding presence, true on CRITICAL_FAIL with verdict expressing it; (2) _resolve_repo_root raises RepoRootError on missing/non-dir paths, main maps to exit 2; (3) enumerate_skills returns None when dir absent (was returning empty set, masked downstream warn-vs-critical disambiguation); (4) COUNT_CLAIM_RE rewritten to mirror canonical COUNT_PATTERN byte-for-byte (handles 'reusable skills', 'slash commands', 'lifecycle hooks', 'specialized agent definitions'); (5) enumerate_count switches on canonical labels with legacy aliases; (6) _walk_targets uses iterdir+prune instead of rglob+postfilter for performance; (7) walked-file containment recheck post symlink resolution (CWE-22 hardening); (8) count_claim emission delegated to canonical validate_marketplace_counts.py per canonical-source-mirror.md (multi-plugin manifests need YAML config); enforce_counts param reserved for PR2; (9) TASK-007 frontmatter merged into one block (assignee was outside metadata); (10) DESIGN-008 added required sections (Requirements Addressed, Design Overview, Component Details, Technology Decisions, Security Considerations, Testing Strategy); (11) REQ-008/DESIGN-008/TASK-008 deferred-list updated to reflect AC3 ships in PR1 and AC4 emission delegated; (12) SKILL.md flag table reflects actual defaults (no .claude/skills/ in default scope); (13) build.md gate 4 uses Skill() invocation instead of hardcoded path. 40 tests pass; self-test PASS."
